scripts.build:puzzles: node scripts/generate-daily-puzzles.js --direction forward --seeds puzzle-seeds.json --catalog public/data/daily-puzzles.json --fill puzzle-seeds.txt --dictionary public/data/3of6game.txt --blocklist public/data/dictionary-blocklist.txt --packed-dictionary public/util/compressed-dictionary.txt --packed-fallback public/util/compressed-dictionary-fallback.txt
scripts.build:puzzles:dry: node scripts/generate-daily-puzzles.js --direction forward --seeds puzzle-seeds.json --catalog public/data/daily-puzzles.json --fill puzzle-seeds.txt --dictionary public/data/3of6game.txt --blocklist public/data/dictionary-blocklist.txt --packed-dictionary public/util/compressed-dictionary.txt --packed-fallback public/util/compressed-dictionary-fallback.txt --dry-run
scripts.build:puzzles:backward: node scripts/generate-daily-puzzles.js --direction backward --seeds puzzle-seeds.json --catalog public/data/daily-puzzles.json --fill puzzle-seeds-backfill.txt --dictionary public/data/3of6game.txt --blocklist public/data/dictionary-blocklist.txt --packed-dictionary public/util/compressed-dictionary.txt --packed-fallback public/util/compressed-dictionary-fallback.txt
